hub.subhead: Short, private self-checks to get the most out of your CSC workshop. Free. No account.
hub.footer_note: These tools stay on your phone. Nothing is sent to a server.
hub.draft_banner: The Chinese version is still being reviewed. The English version is ready.

common.private: Stays on your phone — nothing sent to a server

survey.pick_one_each: Please answer every item to continue.
survey.need_min_rows: Please add at least {min} to continue.

results.pdf_helper: Save or print this. Take it to your CSC appointment, or share it with family.
results.specialist_note: Bring this to your CSC specialist. They can help you plan your next steps.

footer.disclaimer: This is a starting point, not professional counseling. For personalized guidance, talk to your CSC specialist.
